title: Resonance Less Cooperative
storyPurpose: Aurelia Voss formalized; names Spark; Cael debt hint.

panels.description: Private receiving hall: Aurelia Voss the Gilded Merchant: tall elegant merchant leader, black lacquer coat with warm gold filigree, half-veil over one eye, amber lantern pin, teal Rift glass jewelry, composed smile hiding hard bargains lowering half-veil — same amber lanterns as Issue #5 hooded merchant; Seris Vale: Meridian commander, sharp features, storm-dark field coat with three-arc sigil, carries Lost City Rift component crystal and royal trade ledger's ledger residue on desk.

bubbles.text: No. I brought you every door.
bubbles.speaker: Seris Vale

panels.description: Present: Aurelia Voss the Gilded Merchant: tall elegant merchant leader, black lacquer coat with warm gold filigree, half-veil over one eye, amber lantern pin, teal Rift glass jewelry, composed smile hiding hard bargains studying Mira Eggwarden: young adult Hatchery mentor/Keeper, warm brown skin, dark hair in practical braid, travel-stained hatchery coat over Compact robes, Compact lantern charm on satchel, determined protective eyes; Spark's cloak slipping — cyan flash; Lockjaw Wisp: small feline-lizard companion, black fur with warm gold filigree markings, keyhole-shaped pupils, floating brass appraisal rings, silent gait, phases through sealed doors when invited by contract floating appraisal rings circling.

bubbles.text: Resonance is less cooperative when it chooses its Keeper.
bubbles.speaker: Aurelia Voss

panels.description: Cael Vesper the Lanternmaster: mid-40s, warm brown skin, silver-threaded dark hair, deep blue and ember-gold coat, brass lantern clasps, half-mask of painted wood with nested lantern motif stiff at mention of old contract; hidden merchant token glint under lantern clasp.

bubbles.text: Lanternmaster. You still owe a door.
bubbles.speaker: Aurelia Voss

bubbles.text: …I pay my debts when I understand the price.
bubbles.speaker: Cael Vesper

grokPrompt: Original high-energy Western fantasy comic storytelling with dynamic panel composition, dramatic inked linework, richly painted colors, expressive character acting, and clear cinematic action. Original Riftwilds IP only. Black lacquer wood and brass first; warm gold filigree, deep red merchant fabric, teal Rift glass lanterns and crystal accents. NO purple AI-fantasy neon default. NO Marvel/DC/Pokémon characters or logos. Riftwilds comic "The Merchant's Secret" Issue #6, STORY PAGE 6/25 — Resonance Less Cooperative. Story purpose: Aurelia Voss formalized; names Spark; Cael debt hint. Layout: three-stack. 3 panels with clear inked gutters. Panel 1 (p6a): Private receiving hall: Aurelia Voss the Gilded Merchant: tall elegant merchant leader, black lacquer coat with warm gold filigree, half-veil over one eye, amber lantern pin, teal Rift glass jewelry, composed smile hiding hard bargains lowering half-veil — same amber lanterns as Issue #5 hooded merchant; Seris Vale: Meridian commander, sharp features, storm-dark field coat with three-arc sigil, carries Lost City Rift component crystal and royal trade ledger's ledger residue on desk. Panel 2 (p6b): Present: Aurelia Voss the Gilded Merchant: tall elegant merchant leader, black lacquer coat with warm gold filigree, half-veil over one eye, amber lantern pin, teal Rift glass jewelry, composed smile hiding hard bargains studying Mira Eggwarden: young adult Hatchery mentor/Keeper, warm brown skin, dark hair in practical braid, travel-stained hatchery coat over Compact robes, Compact lantern charm on satchel, determined protective eyes; Spark's cloak slipping — cyan flash; Lockjaw Wisp: small feline-lizard companion, black fur with warm gold filigree markings, keyhole-shaped pupils, floating brass appraisal rings, silent gait, phases through sealed doors when invited by contract floating appraisal rings circling. Panel 3 (p6c): Cael Vesper the Lanternmaster: mid-40s, warm brown skin, silver-threaded dark hair, deep blue and ember-gold coat, brass lantern clasps, half-mask of painted wood with nested lantern motif stiff at mention of old contract; hidden merchant token glint under lantern clasp. Characters: mira-eggwarden, cael-vesper, aurelia-voss, seris-vale. Creatures: spark, lockjaw-wisp. Spark design lock: Spark the Glowpup-line Riftborn hatchling: soft luminous fur, cyan-gold rift markings, large expressive eyes, small crystal growths, glowing-tip emotional tail, steadier aura when bonded; cute but original — not a franchise mascot. Keeper lock: Mira Eggwarden: young adult Hatchery mentor/Keeper, warm brown skin, dark hair in practical braid, travel-stained hatchery coat over Compact robes, Compact lantern charm on satchel, determined protective eyes. Merchant lock: Aurelia Voss the Gilded Merchant: tall elegant merchant leader, black lacquer coat with warm gold filigree, half-veil over one eye, amber lantern pin, teal Rift glass jewelry, composed smile hiding hard bargains. Lockjaw lock: Lockjaw Wisp: small feline-lizard companion, black fur with warm gold filigree markings, keyhole-shaped pupils, floating brass appraisal rings, silent gait, phases through sealed doors when invited by contract. Environment: Gilded Crossroads moving bazaar. Time: night. Weather: lantern-lit market mist. Lighting: warm gold lanterns and teal Rift glass glow. Continuity: {"location": "merchant receiving hall", "aurelia": "formalized", "cael": "debt-hint", "dialogueLock": "map-every-door"} Leave empty balloon-safe and narration-safe negative space in upper/lower panel corners. NO readable text of any kind in the artwork.
negativePrompt: readable dialogue text, captions, logos, watermarks, page numbers, UI chrome, Marvel, DC, Pokémon, manga screentone trademarks, extra limbs, duplicate characters, missing companions, purple neon fantasy default, photoreal modern clothing, Pikachu lookalike, Cal Reed, Voltkit, companion trafficking glorified
letteringInstructions: Standard speech + narration; keep tails off faces and Spark's eyes; merchant speech polished/controlled.
artAlt: Resonance Less Cooperative — The Merchant's Secret page 6
transcript: SPEECH (Aurelia Voss): You brought me a map.
SPEECH (Seris Vale): No. I brought you every door.
SPEECH (Aurelia Voss): Resonance is less cooperative when it chooses its Keeper.
WHISPER (Aurelia Voss): Lanternmaster. You still owe a door.
SPEECH (Cael Vesper): …I pay my debts when I understand the price.
